mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bluenote_counter.counter_snapshot ( id, target_type, target_id, counter_field, counter_value, snapshot_version, flushed_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{counterField}, #{counterValue}, #{snapshotVersion}, #{flushedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE counter_value = VALUES(counter_value), snapshot_version = snapshot_version + 1, flushed_at = VALUES(flushed_at), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
